description.value: Aura faint divination; CL 3rd; Slot eyes; Price 2,500 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION These lenses are made of special crystal and fit over the eyes of the wearer. They grant a +5 competence bonus on Perception checks. Both lenses must be worn to gain the benefit. Wearing only one causes a character to become dizzy and stunned for 1 round. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, clairaudience/clairvoyance; Cost 1,250 gp.
